# tfe_ssh_key

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SSH key.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `key` (String, Sensitive) The text of the SSH private key
- `key_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The text of the SSH private key, guaranteed not to be written to state.
- `key_wo_version` (Number) Version of the write-only key to trigger updates
- `organization` (String) The name of the organization.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated ID for the SSH key.
